resources.string: Keep your medication routine on track
Choose a color to identify this medication
Your data is stored only on your device and is not shared with third parties. Dose Certa respects your privacy in accordance with the General Data Protection Law (LGPD).

Our Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 30, 2025

Your privacy is our top priority. We created Dose Certa with a fundamental principle: we do not collect, store, or share your personal health information.

1. The Essential: Your Data is Yours Alone

To be as transparent as possible, here's what you need to know:

• No data is sent to us: All information you enter in the app (medication names, times, dose history) is saved exclusively on your phone.

• No one else has access: We, the developers of Dose Certa, cannot see, access, or analyze your information.

• You have 100% control: You can add, edit, and delete your data at any time, directly in the app.

2. What Data Does the App Use (and Where Is It Stored)?

Dose Certa needs to save some information on your own device to function properly. They are:

• Medication Information: Name, dosage, and notes you enter.

• Alarm Configuration: The times and frequency you set for your reminders.

• Usage History: The record of when you confirm you took or skipped a dose.

To repeat: All this information is stored securely only in your device's internal memory. If you uninstall the app, all this data will be permanently deleted.

3. What We DO NOT Do

To leave no doubt, our policy is clear:

• We DO NOT sell your information.

• We DO NOT share your data with third parties (companies, advertisers, etc.).

• We DO NOT use your data for marketing or advertising purposes.

• We DO NOT track your location or other activities on your phone.

4. Your Rights as a Data Subject (LGPD)

The General Data Protection Law (LGPD) guarantees you rights over your information. With Dose Certa, exercising them is simple:

• Right of Access: You can see all your data at any time, simply by navigating through the app.

• Right of Correction: You can edit any incorrect information directly on the medication editing screens.

• Right of Elimination (Forgetting): You can delete a specific medication or all your information by uninstalling the app from your phone.

5. App Permissions

To function, Dose Certa will request Notification permission. This permission is essential so we can remind you of your medications with alarms, even if the app is closed. We will not request any other permission that is not strictly necessary for the app to function.

6. Consent

By clicking "Agree and Continue", you declare that you have read, understood, and agree with this Privacy Policy, and understand that your data will be stored securely and locally only on your device.
This application does not replace the guidance of a healthcare professional. Always follow your doctor\'s prescription. If in doubt, consult your doctor or pharmacist.
Did you take an extra dose today?
